candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; clearly within STD definition and excludes leases.
There are current and non-current rows with this exact label; the current row likely belongs in STD, but duplicate identical labels on the same sheet create ambiguity in row identification.

variables.notes: R:c. Chosen the explicit current-maturities debt line because it is uniquely identifiable and excludes leases. Manual review is recommended because the balance sheet also contains a current 'Bank Borrowings' row with the same exact label as a non-current row, so additional current debt may exist but cannot be unambiguously referenced without risking double counting or row ambiguity.
